prestazioni: B58B30C (3.0L inline-6) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer, and 76mm exducer, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a Tomei 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system featuring a 304 stainless steel muffler core for optimized backpressure and spool characteristics

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone engine management system with custom calibration for the B58B30C, including individual cylinder fuel trims, flex-fuel compatibility (E85), and launch control mapping optimized for a 7-speed ZF 8HP76 transmission with a P3Cars P3X shift kit for 150ms shift times

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, 12-position rebound, and custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) paired with Cusco Type RS 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars, along with a full Whiteline alignment kit (camber bolts, toe arms) for aggressive -3.5° front and -2.8° rear camber settings
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (GR Heritage Edition-specific carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom matte bronze paint finish and exposed carbon weave on the hood and trunk lid, complemented by a Seibon carbon fiber GT-style rear wing with adjustable angle (0-15°) and integrated third brake light

Custom interior retrim by Status Racing featuring Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats with embroidered GR Heritage Edition logos, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay with a Motec C127 digital dash display replacing the stock cluster

Enkei PF07 wheels in 19x10.5 +22 front and 19x12 +35 rear with a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear) and paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 380mm and 355mm two-piece rotors, respectively, featuring custom gold anodized caliper pistons
